reason: Node cites (GT-positive-unital: ||Phi||=1) for ||P|| <= 1+C eta. The cited source Idel-2013 Definition 2.1 (refs/idel-2013/idel-2013.md:345-349) defines positive, unital, Hermitian but does NOT state that a unital positive map is order-unit-norm contractive with ||Phi||=1; that contractivity is a derived theorem (Russo-Dye/Kadison type). I opened both Idel-2013 (345-393) and HOS order-unit section (368-384): neither contains ||Phi||=1 in the order-unit operator norm for a unital positive map at the cited locus. The external GT-positive-unital asserts contractivity beyond what its source byte-matches. Provenance gap.
